title: rudbeckia columnaris var. tagetes
intro: Rudbeckia columnaris var. tagetes, also known as the Mexican Gold flower or Mexican Sunflower, is a variety of flowering plant native to Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Rudbeckia columnaris var. tagetes include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and relieve respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve infusing the flowers in hot water to make a tea or using the plant in a tincture, with some also using it in capsule or powder form for medicinal purposes.
